ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "readme_file" TEXT /* Readme file for the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the data was collected */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time the data was collected */,
  "height" REAL /* Height at which the data was collected */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., temperature, wind speed) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "collected_by" TEXT /* User who collected the data */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the dataset (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wind_speeds" (
  "wind_speed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wind speed entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset the wind speed belongs to */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed value */,
  "quality_flag" TEXT /* Quality flag for the wind speed data (e.g., good, questionable, bad) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wind_speed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wind_speeds_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wind_directions" (
  "wind_direction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wind direction entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset the wind direction belongs to */,
  "wind_direction" REAL /* Wind direction value */,
  "quality_flag" TEXT /* Quality flag for the wind direction data (e.g., good, questionable, bad) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wind_direction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wind_directions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "potential_temperatures" (
  "potential_temperature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each potential temperature entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset the potential temperature belongs to */,
  "potential_temperature" REAL /* Potential temperature value */,
  "quality_flag" TEXT /* Quality flag for the potential temperature data (e.g., good, questionable, bad) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("potential_temperature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_potential_temperatures_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mixing_ratios" (
  "mixing_ratio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mixing ratio entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset the mixing ratio belongs to */,
  "mixing_ratio" REAL /* Mixing ratio value */,
  "quality_flag" TEXT /* Quality flag for the mixing ratio data (e.g., good, questionable, bad) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mixing_ratio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mixing_ratios_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for user login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user login */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role of the user */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who accessed the data */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset that was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, download, modify) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("username"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data change */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset version */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the change */,
  "change_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_changes_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("username"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_changes_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES data_versions ("version_id")
)
